calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation.
Cheri Gorman, Litigation Specialist for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Julia Vargas.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 26, 2010, which set the trial date of September 13, 2010. Trial was continued to today, October 4, 2010. Parties waived notice of the new trial dated.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, October 4, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation, and against defendant Julia Vargas as follows:

Principal - $25,268.50.
Interest - $2,734.54.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $428.00.

Total - $31,256.04.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Continued To Oct-04-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
